Role.title: Role
Role.description: Defines the distinct roles within the application, each with specific access privileges.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Role entity.

name.description: The name of the role (e.g., 'Super Admin', 'Employee').

description.description: A brief description explaining the responsibilities and scope of the role.

permissions.description: A list of distinct permission identifiers associated with this role, determining what actions users with this role can perform.

Department.title: Department
Department.description: Represents a department or organizational unit within the company.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Department entity.

name.description: The name of the department (e.g., 'Engineering', 'Human Resources').

description.description: A brief description of the department's primary functions and responsibilities.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents an individual user account in the system, detailing their profile, role, and reporting structure.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The user's email address, used for login and notifications. Must be unique across all users.

password.description: The user's password (stored for visibility in this prototype's user management table).

role.description: The friendly name of the role assigned to this user.

department.description: The name of the department the user belongs to.

reportingToId.description: Optional reference to the ID of the user's direct manager or team lead.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was last updated.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a specific task that can be assigned, tracked, and managed within the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Task entity.

title.description: A concise title for the task.

description.description: A detailed explanation of the task, including objectives and requirements.

status.description: The current status of the task (e.g., 'Pending', 'In Progress', 'Completed', 'On Hold').

deadline.description: The target date and time by which the task is expected to be completed.

assignedToId.description: Reference to the ID of the user to whom this task is assigned.

assignedById.description: Reference to the ID of the user who created and assigned this task.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the task was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the task was last updated.

definition.description: Stores user profiles. Includes fields like 'role', 'department', and 'password' for administrative tracking.
